info.title: Google Chrome Management API
info.description: The Chrome Management API provides programmatic access to manage Chrome browser deployments and ChromeOS devices in enterprise environments. It enables administrators to retrieve telemetry data from managed devices, query information about installed apps and extensions, generate reports on browser and device usage, and manage Chrome policies at scale. The API is part of the Google Workspace Admin suite and requires appropriate admin privileges and OAuth 2.0 authentication scopes.

servers.description: Google Chrome Management API production endpoint

tags.name: Telemetry Devices
tags.description: Operations for retrieving telemetry data from managed ChromeOS devices including hardware specs, OS version, CPU, memory, storage, and network information.

tags.name: Telemetry Events
tags.description: Operations for listing telemetry events from managed ChromeOS devices such as USB peripherals, audio, network state changes, and hardware status events.

tags.name: Telemetry Users
tags.description: Operations for retrieving telemetry information associated with managed users on ChromeOS devices.

tags.name: Telemetry Notification Configs
tags.description: Operations for managing telemetry notification configurations that enable push notifications for telemetry events.

tags.name: App Details
tags.description: Operations for retrieving information about Chrome apps, extensions, and Android apps available to managed devices.

tags.name: Reports
tags.description: Operations for generating reports about browsers, devices, installed apps, extensions, and app usage within the enterprise.

get.description: Lists all telemetry devices for a customer. Retrieves device-level telemetry data including hardware specifications, operating system version, CPU, memory, storage, network interfaces, battery status, and peripheral information for managed ChromeOS devices.

parameters.name: pageSize
parameters.description: Maximum number of results to return. Maximum and default value is 100.

parameters.name: pageToken
parameters.description: Token to specify next page in the result set.

parameters.name: filter
parameters.description: Filter to restrict results. Supports filtering by serial number, device ID, org unit, and timestamps. Example: serial_number=ABC123 AND timestamp>2024-01-01T00:00:00Z

parameters.name: readMask
parameters.description: Fields to include in the response. Use this to request specific telemetry data categories such as cpuInfo, cpuStatusReport, memoryInfo, memoryStatusReport, networkInfo, osUpdateStatus, storageInfo, storageStatusReport, batteryInfo, batteryStatusReport, networkDiagnosticsReport, and more.

200.description: Successful response with list of telemetry devices

get.description: Retrieves a single telemetry device by its resource name. Returns detailed telemetry data for the specified managed ChromeOS device.

parameters.name: deviceId
parameters.description: Unique identifier of the telemetry device.

parameters.name: readMask
parameters.description: Fields to include in the response.

200.description: Successful response with the telemetry device

get.description: Lists telemetry events for a customer. Events include USB peripherals added or removed, audio severe underrun, network state changes, hardware status changes, and other device-level events. Events are retained for a limited time.

parameters.name: pageSize
parameters.description: Maximum number of results to return. Maximum value is 1000.

parameters.name: pageToken
parameters.description: Token to specify next page in the result set.

parameters.name: filter
parameters.description: Filter to restrict results. Supports filtering by event type, device, user, and timestamp.

parameters.name: readMask
parameters.description: Fields to include in the response. Supported event types: audioSevereUnderrunEvent, usbPeripheralsEvent, networkStateChangeEvent, httpsLatencyChangeEvent, wifiSignalStrengthEvent, vpnConnectionStateChangeEvent, appInstallEvent, appUninstallEvent, appLaunchEvent.

200.description: Successful response with list of telemetry events

get.description: Lists all telemetry users for a customer. Retrieves user-level telemetry data including user email, user devices, and user activity information on managed ChromeOS devices.

parameters.name: pageSize
parameters.description: Maximum number of results to return.

parameters.name: pageToken
parameters.description: Token to specify next page in the result set.

parameters.name: filter
parameters.description: Filter to restrict results. Supports filtering by user email and org unit.

parameters.name: readMask
parameters.description: Fields to include in the response.

200.description: Successful response with list of telemetry users

get.description: Retrieves a single telemetry user by their resource name. Returns detailed user-level telemetry data for the specified managed user.

parameters.name: userId
parameters.description: Unique identifier of the telemetry user.

parameters.name: readMask
parameters.description: Fields to include in the response.

200.description: Successful response with the telemetry user

get.description: Lists all telemetry notification configurations for a customer. Notification configs define which telemetry events trigger push notifications to the specified Google Cloud Pub/Sub topic.

parameters.name: pageSize
parameters.description: Maximum number of results to return.

parameters.name: pageToken
parameters.description: Token to specify next page in the result set.

200.description: Successful response with list of notification configs

post.description: Creates a telemetry notification configuration for a customer. The configuration specifies which telemetry events trigger push notifications and the Google Cloud Pub/Sub topic to deliver them to.

delete.description: Deletes a telemetry notification configuration for a customer.

parameters.name: configId
parameters.description: Identifier of the notification config to delete.

get.description: Retrieves specific information about a Chrome app or extension by its app ID. Returns metadata including name, description, permissions, icons, type, and store information.

parameters.name: appId
parameters.description: The Chrome Web Store app ID.

200.description: Successful response with Chrome app details

get.description: Retrieves specific information about an Android app by its package name. Returns metadata for apps available on managed ChromeOS devices through Google Play.

parameters.name: appId
parameters.description: The Android app package name.

200.description: Successful response with Android app details

get.description: Retrieves specific information about a web app. Returns metadata for progressive web apps or web links available to managed ChromeOS devices.

parameters.name: appId
parameters.description: The web app identifier.

200.description: Successful response with web app details

get.description: Generates a count report of Chrome browser versions installed across all managed browsers. Useful for tracking update adoption and identifying outdated browser installations.

parameters.name: orgUnitId
parameters.description: The organizational unit ID. If omitted, returns data for all org units.

parameters.name: filter
parameters.description: Filter string for narrowing results. Supports filtering by version, channel, platform, and last active date.

parameters.name: pageSize
parameters.description: Maximum number of results to return.

parameters.name: pageToken
parameters.description: Token for pagination.

200.description: Successful response with Chrome version counts

get.description: Generates a report of installed apps and extensions across all managed browsers and devices. Provides counts and details for each app or extension including version, install type, and number of installations.

parameters.name: orgUnitId
parameters.description: The organizational unit ID.

parameters.name: filter
parameters.description: Filter string. Supports filtering by app name, app ID, app type, install type, and permissions.

parameters.name: orderBy
parameters.description: Field to sort results by. Supported fields: app_name, install_type, machine_count, and permission_count.

parameters.name: pageSize
parameters.description: Maximum number of results to return.

parameters.name: pageToken
parameters.description: Token for pagination.

200.description: Successful response with installed app counts

get.summary: Find devices with a specific app installed
get.description: Generates a report listing all managed browsers and devices that have a specified app or extension installed. Useful for tracking distribution and compliance of specific applications.

parameters.name: appId
parameters.description: The app ID to search for.

parameters.name: appType
parameters.description: Type of the app. Values include EXTENSION, APP, THEME, HOSTED_APP.

parameters.name: orgUnitId
parameters.description: The organizational unit ID.

parameters.name: filter
parameters.description: Filter string for narrowing results.

parameters.name: orderBy
parameters.description: Field to sort results by.

parameters.name: pageSize
parameters.description: Maximum number of results to return.

parameters.name: pageToken
parameters.description: Token for pagination.

200.description: Successful response with devices that have the specified app installed

get.summary: Count ChromeOS devices reaching auto-update expiration
get.description: Generates a report counting ChromeOS devices grouped by their auto-update expiration date. Helps administrators plan for hardware refresh cycles and identify devices that will lose security update support.

parameters.name: orgUnitId
parameters.description: The organizational unit ID.

parameters.name: minAueDate
parameters.description: Minimum auto-update expiration date filter (inclusive) in yyyy-mm-dd format.

parameters.name: maxAueDate
parameters.description: Maximum auto-update expiration date filter (inclusive) in yyyy-mm-dd format.

parameters.name: pageSize
parameters.description: Maximum number of results to return.

parameters.name: pageToken
parameters.description: Token for pagination.

200.description: Successful response with device counts by auto-update expiration date

get.description: Generates a report counting managed Chrome browsers that need administrator attention. Categories include browsers with pending updates, browsers recently not active, browsers with no recent policy sync, and browsers that recently enrolled.

parameters.name: orgUnitId
parameters.description: The organizational unit ID.

200.description: Successful response with browser attention counts

get.summary: Count ChromeOS devices needing OS update
get.description: Generates a report counting ChromeOS devices that need an operating system update, grouped by OS version and update status.

parameters.name: orgUnitId
parameters.description: The organizational unit ID.

parameters.name: pageSize
parameters.description: Maximum number of results to return.

parameters.name: pageToken
parameters.description: Token for pagination.

200.description: Successful response with device counts needing OS updates

get.description: Generates a report counting ChromeOS devices grouped by hardware specifications such as model, CPU, and storage capacity. Provides a fleet-level view of hardware diversity.

parameters.name: orgUnitId
parameters.description: The organizational unit ID.

parameters.name: readMask
parameters.description: Fields to include in the response. Options include cpuReports, memoryReports, modelReports, storageReports.

200.description: Successful response with hardware fleet counts

oauth2.description: Google OAuth 2.0 authentication. Requires appropriate Chrome Management API scopes.

scopes.https://www.googleapis.com/auth/chrome.m: View Chrome browser and device reports

customerId.name: customerId
customerId.description: Google Workspace customer ID. Use 'my_customer' to refer to the customer associated with the authenticated admin.

BadRequest.description: The request was invalid. Check the filter syntax, field names, and parameter values.

Unauthorized.description: The request lacks valid authentication credentials. Ensure a valid OAuth 2.0 access token is provided.

Forbidden.description: The authenticated user does not have the required permissions. Ensure the appropriate admin role and API scope are granted.

NotFound.description: The requested resource was not found.

GoogleRpcStatus.description: Standard Google API error response following the google.rpc.Status format.

details.description: A list of messages carrying error details.

TelemetryDevice.description: Telemetry data for a single managed ChromeOS device, including hardware, OS, network, storage, and peripheral information.

name.description: Resource name of the telemetry device. Format: customers/{customer}/telemetry/devices/{device}

orgUnitId.description: Organizational unit ID of the device.

deviceId.description: Unique device identifier from the Directory API.

cpuStatusReport.description: CPU status reports with usage and temperature data.

memoryStatusReport.description: Memory status reports with usage data.

storageStatusReport.description: Storage status reports with disk usage data.

batteryStatusReport.description: Battery status reports with charge level and cycle counts.

graphicsStatusReport.description: Graphics adapter and display status reports.

heartbeatStatusReport.description: Heartbeat status reports with timestamps indicating the device is online.

networkDiagnosticsReport.description: Network diagnostics reports with latency and HTTPS test results.

CpuStatusReport.description: CPU usage and temperature report at a point in time.

MemoryStatusReport.description: Memory usage report at a point in time.

pageFaults.description: Number of page faults since the last report.

networkDevices.description: List of network devices and their properties.

mdn.description: MDN (phone number) of the cellular device.

NetworkStatusReport.description: Network status report at a point in time.

lanIpAddress.description: LAN IP address of the device.

wifiPowerManagementEnabled.description: Whether WiFi power management is enabled.

newPlatformVersion.description: New platform version of the pending update.

newRequestedPlatformVersion.description: New platform version of the requested update.

lastUpdateTime.description: Timestamp of the last update check.

lastUpdateCheckTime.description: Timestamp of the last update check.

lastRebootTime.description: Timestamp of the last device reboot.

storageTotalBytes.description: Total storage of the volume in bytes.

storageFreeBytes.description: Free storage of the volume in bytes.

StorageStatusReport.description: Storage usage report at a point in time.

disk.description: Disk information for each disk on the device.

ioTimeThisSession.description: Time spent on I/O operations this session.

discardTimeThisSession.description: Time spent on discard operations this session.

volumeIds.description: Volume IDs associated with this disk.

BatteryStatusReport.description: Battery status report at a point in time.

fullChargeCapacity.description: Full charge capacity in milliamp hours.

inputMute.description: Whether the audio input is muted.

outputMute.description: Whether the audio output is muted.

inputDevice.description: Name of the active input audio device.

outputDevice.description: Name of the active output audio device.

usbPeripheralReport.description: List of USB peripherals connected to the device.

firmwareVersion.description: Firmware version of the USB device.

bootUpTime.description: Timestamp when the device booted up.

shutdownTime.description: Timestamp when the device shut down.

HeartbeatStatusReport.description: Heartbeat status indicating the device is online.

NetworkDiagnosticsReport.description: Network diagnostics report with latency and HTTPS test results.

problem.description: Problem type if the HTTPS latency test encountered an issue.

TelemetryEvent.description: A telemetry event from a managed ChromeOS device.

name.description: Resource name of the telemetry event.

device.description: Resource name of the device that generated the event.

user.description: Resource name of the user associated with the event.

audioSevereUnderrunEvent.description: Details of an audio severe underrun event.

usbPeripheralsEvent.description: Details of a USB peripheral event.

networkStateChangeEvent.description: Details of a network state change event.

httpsLatencyChangeEvent.description: Details of an HTTPS latency change event.

TelemetryUser.description: Telemetry information for a managed user.

name.description: Resource name of the telemetry user.

orgUnitId.description: Organizational unit ID of the user.

userEmail.description: Email address of the managed user.

userDevice.description: Devices associated with this user and their telemetry data.

name.description: Resource name of the notification config.

filter.description: Filter to specify which events trigger notifications.

eventTypes.description: Event types to receive notifications for.

googleCloudPubsubTopic.description: Google Cloud Pub/Sub topic to deliver notifications to. Format: projects/{project}/topics/{topic}

ChromeAppInfo.description: Information about a Chrome app or extension.

displayName.description: Display name of the app or extension.

description.description: Description of the app or extension.

detailUri.description: URL to the app detail page in the Chrome Web Store.

firstPublishTime.description: When the app was first published.

latestPublishTime.description: When the app was last published.

privacyPolicyUri.description: URL to the app's privacy policy.

isTheme.description: Whether the app is a Chrome theme.

isCwsHosted.description: Whether the app is hosted in the Chrome Web Store.

kioskEnabled.description: Whether the app supports kiosk mode.

supportEnabled.description: Whether the app has a support page.

chromeAppPermissions.description: Permissions requested by the Chrome app.

documentationUri.description: URL to documentation about the permission.

accessUserData.description: Whether the permission accesses user data.

siteAccess.description: Host permissions requested by the app.

AndroidAppInfo.description: Information about an Android app available on managed ChromeOS devices.

displayName.description: Display name of the Android app.

permissions.description: Permissions requested by the Android app.

displayName.description: Display name of the web app.

ListTelemetryDevicesResponse.description: Response containing a list of telemetry devices.

nextPageToken.description: Token for retrieving the next page of results.

ListTelemetryEventsResponse.description: Response containing a list of telemetry events.

nextPageToken.description: Token for retrieving the next page of results.

ListTelemetryUsersResponse.description: Response containing a list of telemetry users.

nextPageToken.description: Token for retrieving the next page of results.

ListTelemetryNotificationConfigsResponse.description: Response containing a list of telemetry notification configurations.

nextPageToken.description: Token for retrieving the next page of results.

CountChromeVersionsResponse.description: Response containing counts of Chrome browser versions.

count.description: Number of browsers running this version.

nextPageToken.description: Token for the next page of results.

totalSize.description: Total number of browser version entries.

CountInstalledAppsResponse.description: Response containing counts of installed apps and extensions.

browserDeviceCount.description: Number of browsers with this app installed.

osUserCount.description: Number of ChromeOS users with this app installed.

disabled.description: Whether the app is disabled by policy.

nextPageToken.description: Token for the next page of results.

FindInstalledAppDevicesResponse.description: Response listing devices with a specific app installed.

devices.description: Devices with the specified app installed.

appVersion.description: Version of the app installed on this device.

nextPageToken.description: Token for the next page of results.

totalSize.description: Total number of devices with the app.

CountChromeDevicesReachingAutoExpiration.description: Response containing counts of ChromeOS devices by auto-update expiration date.

count.description: Number of devices with this model.

expired.description: Whether the AUE date has passed.

CountChromeBrowsersNeedingAttentionRespo.description: Response with counts of Chrome browsers needing attention.

pendingBrowserUpdateCount.description: Number of browsers with a pending update.

noRecentActivityCount.description: Number of browsers with no recent activity.

notRecentlyConnectedCount.description: Number of browsers that have not recently synced policy.

CountChromeDevicesThatNeedOsUpdateRespon.description: Response containing counts of devices needing OS updates.

count.description: Number of devices running this version.

CountChromeHardwareFleetDevicesResponse.description: Response containing hardware fleet device counts.
